text: Yes, math LMs respect precedence (Qwen2.5-Math-7B 21/48 correct pre-FT, 48/48 post-FT; DeepSeek-Math-7B 29/48), while a non-math control (Llama-3.1-8B base) scores 0/48 and cannot do the task. Among errors, math LMs show an 18-29% left-to-right lean.

comments._self: CAVEAT (audit): the Llama-3.1-8B-base 0/48 result does NOT support 'cannot do the task' as a capability claim. There is no engagement/format control (no check that the base model even emits a parseable answer in the prompt format), so 0/48 is consistent with a format/engagement failure rather than an inability to respect operator precedence. Read as: 'consistent with format/engagement failure; not a capability claim.'
